Contact

You can arrange everything with one phone call. Reception is available every working day.

Call us

+420 602 195 413

Opening hours

Monday 8:00 – 16:00
Tuesday 8:00 – 16:00
Wednesday 8:00 – 16:00
Thursday 8:00 – 16:00
Friday 8:00 – 16:00
Saturday Closed
Sunday Closed

Where to find us

Krajinská 251/16

370 01 České Budějovice

2nd floor, entrance next to Tesco

Google Maps — Krajinská 251/16, České Budějovice

For new patients

Is this your first visit? You don't need to prepare anything — just call.

Reception will ask for your name, phone number, insurance company and what you need to address. At the first visit the doctor will examine you, discuss your situation and propose a treatment plan with a price. No commitments — you decide once you have all the information.

New patients are welcome here.

Call and book an appointment

Acute pain outside opening hours

If you are experiencing acute dental pain and our clinic is closed, contact the emergency dental service:

Zubní pohotovost s.r.o.

Lidická tř. 78, 370 01 České Budějovice

(České spořitelna building, entrance from Lidická street, 1st floor)

www.zubnipohotovostcb.cz

Emergency opening hours:
Mon–Fri: 16:00 – 22:00
Sat, Sun, public holidays: 8:00 – 20:00
